financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more money than expected, especially in drinks and food in India.
A special tax from last year affected profits, but the company believes it will improve soon.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but unpredictable coffee prices are making it hard to control costs.
Tariffs in Brazil are causing price jumps, which could affect how much money the company makes in the future.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in caring for the environment, which boosts its overall score.
There is room for improvement in how the company manages people and leadership, affecting its score.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong sales and market position.
They maintained a positive attitude throughout, focusing on their successful strategies and future plans.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company gave clear answers about their operations but was unclear about their plans for international growth.
They provided specific numbers for some questions, but other answers were too general and not detailed.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well with strong sales and plans to keep growing, which is a good sign for investors.
There are some worries about coffee prices and tariffs, but the company is focusing on expanding and keeping its market share.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it made more money and sold more products both in India and abroad.
There are some risks like unpredictable coffee prices and tough competition, but the company is still growing by creating new products.
